title: Portfolio Website
description: A personal portfolio website for DSC 106, built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, reusable navigation, theme switching, and project data loaded from JSON.

title: DataHacks 2026 Strategy Project
description: A Python project for the DataHacks 2026 economics track, focused on BTC, ETH, and SOL binary prediction market strategies and backtesting.

title: Taylor Swift Lyrics Analysis
description: An analysis on Taylor Swift's song lyrics using Python, including data collection, cleaning, and visualization of themes, word usage, and sentiment across her discography.

title: DSC 106 Data Visualization
description: A course repository for DSC 106 Data Visualization, including labs, portfolio work, and visualization assignments.

title: DSC 140B SoCal Geoguesser
description: DSC 140B project creating a SoCal-themed Geoguesser system, that identifies locations based on visual cues.

title: Power Outage Length Analysis
description: A Jupyter Notebook data science project analyzing major power outages and factors related to outage length.

title: GitHub Skills: Introduction to GitHub
description: A GitHub Skills practice repository for learning basic GitHub workflows, repositories, commits, and collaboration tools.

title: Disney Doppelganger Analysis
description: A doppelganger analysis project comparing Disney characters to real-world celebrities, using data collection, cleaning, and visualization to explore similarities and patterns.

title: GitHub Skills: Review Pull Requests
description: A GitHub Skills practice repository for learning how to review pull requests and collaborate through code review.

title: Personal GitHub Repository
description: A personal repository used for experimenting with GitHub, organizing code, and practicing project setup.

title: Projects Repository
description: A Jupyter Notebook repository used for coursework, experiments, and early data science project practice.

title: Audio-Reactive City Visualizer
description: A creative coding project concept using p5.js and WEBGL to create a city scene where buildings, lights, and fireworks react to sound.
